caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, held from July 23-29, 2018. A speaker stands at a podium, delivering a talk on data pipelines and their scaling. The slide displayed behind him outlines key points of discussion, including an overview of scaling data pipelines, components of Airflow such as Celery and Machine Learning (ML), the distinction between ML and data pipelines, and an overview of Airflow with a specific use case. The slide is titled "BUT FOR US?" and emphasizes "THE BIG PICTURE," suggesting that the presentation aims to provide a comprehensive understanding of these topics for the audience. The setting appears professional, with a focus on technical and educational content relevant to Python developers and data scientists.
